name: Mandate
description: Policy gatekeeper for AI agent wallets. Tools: mandate_register (once), mandate_validate (before EVERY financial action), mandate_status. Also installs a hook that auto-intercepts financial tool calls as safety net. No private key needed.

runtimeKey.description: Mandate runtime key (mndt_live_... or mndt_test_...). Get one via mandate_register tool or POST https://app.mandate.md/api/agents/register (no auth).

security.reason: Does NOT read environment variables. RuntimeKey is taken only from plugin config (sensitive field). Sends pre-flight policy validation requests to app.mandate.md before financial tool calls.
